# Generated SDK Assets

This directory contains auto-generated code for the Edgework SDK.

**DO NOT EDIT MANUALLY.**

## Contents

*   **`rust/`**: Rust client code generated by OpenAPI Generator.
*   **`go/`**: (If present) Go client code.
*   **`typescript/`**: (If present) Legacy TypeScript generation (modern TS is in `src/compute/gateway`).

Regenerate using `bun scripts/generate-clients.ts`.

Last Updated: 2026-01-31
